items.name: Soulslayer
items.description:
A blade forged not to cut, not to stab, but to crush and scatter. Once wielded by an executioner who believed mercy was a swift death, Skullscatter ensures no soul departs intact. Those struck by it do not simply perish—they are unmade, their remnants scattered to the void, leaving nothing behind but dust and echoes of the damned.

UGC From HYC Tower Defense
